fields.name: Maderon's Gift
fields.rules_text_raw:
Choose either Draw or Play.
Then shuffle your discard pile and
randomly choose a card from it.
If you chose Draw, put that card into your hand and draw
a number of cards equal to its cost.
If you chose Play, instantly play the chosen card without
paying its cost and put a number of damage counters on
yourself equal to its cost.
